narrative:
Parma City has 50,946 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.6 percentage points.
